## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss article generation, client management, and content quality improvement processes.](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [20 articles ready for upload; need to generate more by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Refresh/optimization workflow needs improvement; manual approach as interim solution](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Writers need clearer guidelines and feedback to enhance content quality](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Establish weekly schedules for each client, including writing, editing, and uploading timelines](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### Article Generation Status

  - [20 articles ready for upload, covering last week and this week](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Clients: Arena Tribe, Web Stacks (articles ready, need upload)](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Napsack: 400 articles needed in next 3 months; feasible if client isn't too picky on topics](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)

### Content Refresh and Optimization

  - [Current refresh workflow has issues (e.g., generating additional content, forgetting original content)](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Andrej to help develop a more efficient refresh process using ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Manual refresh as interim solution for smaller article volumes (e.g., 5 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### Writer Management and Content Quality

  - [Need for hands-on approach with final outputs and editing](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Issues noticed: repetitive content, poor readability, identical intros](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Writers should edit intros and conclusions, not just rely on AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Implement feedback loop with writers to improve AROPS workflow and reduce AI repetition](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)

### Workflow and Timeline Management

  - [Establish clear weekly schedules for each client](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Include writing, editing, and uploading timelines](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Coordinate with upload resource (possibly Victoria) for efficient scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Share proposed timelines by end of day to avoid conflicts with shared writers](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Upload Process and Quality Control

  - [Double-check Nish's work (1-2 hours per client)](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Common mistakes: missing focus keywords, SEO titles](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Consider creating a checklist for content writers to verify published content](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Ensure writers update Airtable with published articles at week's start](https://fathom.video/share/Zp8ze9sM73TsG5z2LfXPH5JdFLyBrBs6?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

## Next Steps

  - Andrej and Prateek to create and share proposed weekly timelines for their clients
  - Develop more detailed Loom recordings for writer onboarding and process explanation
  - Andrej to work on improving the article refresh/optimization workflow
  - Implement stricter quality control measures before publishing
  - Establish feedback loop with writers for continuous improvement of AROPS and content quality
  - Introduce team members to assigned writers and begin work delegation next week
